tweets.text:
So Border Patrol won’t be sent into the interior due to optics? 

What about Ma and Pa America’s optics.  What about the silent majority of you at home who just want safe neighborhoods? 

Prioritizing activist outrage over American safety isn’t leadership — it’s surrender. The mission should come first. 

Secure the country for the people who actually built it.

Wake up!
